_note: Decorative motif index. These are the 'hand-made' touches that kill the flat-AI look — grain, highlighter, doodles, connector dots, etc. This file is a lookup; copy-paste CSS/SVG for each lives in reference/directions.md (Motif Cookbook). ideate.py references these ids per direction.

motifs.name: Film grain / noise
motifs.use: SVG feTurbulence overlay at 5-8% — instantly removes vector flatness. Use on almost everything.

motifs.name: Aurora mesh gradient
motifs.use: 2-3 large soft radial blooms blended for depth.

motifs.name: Glowing gradient orb
motifs.use: One big blurred radial circle as the focal mass behind type.

motifs.name: Soft tinted glow
motifs.use: Large blurred accent-coloured glow; tint to bg, never pure black.

motifs.name: Ruled grid paper
motifs.use: Faint engineering grid — blueprint/diagram/tutorial backdrops.

motifs.name: Dot grid
motifs.use: Faint dotted grid — techy/notebook texture.

motifs.name: Marker highlight
motifs.use: Skewed translucent accent block behind a key word (use <mark> in copy).

motifs.name: Hand-drawn underline
motifs.use: Wobbly SVG stroke under a word — editorial/doodle warmth.

motifs.name: Hand-drawn arrow
motifs.use: Curved sketch arrow pointing at the thing that matters.

motifs.name: Connector dots + lines
motifs.use: Endpoint dots joined by lines — diagrams, 'pin' callouts.

motifs.name: Sparkle / starburst
motifs.use: 4-point sparkle or sunburst as a playful accent.

motifs.name: Y2K sparkle
motifs.use: Glossy 4-point sparkles orbiting chrome type.

motifs.name: Washi tape strip
motifs.use: Translucent angled tape pinning a card/photo — collage.

motifs.name: Torn paper edge
motifs.use: Ragged clip-path edge for layered collage fragments.

motifs.name: Halftone dots
motifs.use: Dot-pattern shading — riso/print/retro.

motifs.name: CRT scanlines
motifs.use: Faint horizontal lines — neon/cyber/retro screen feel.

motifs.name: Organic blob
motifs.use: Soft flowing border-radius shape — organic/wellness/y2k.

motifs.name: Perspective grid horizon
motifs.use: Vanishing-point floor grid — vaporwave.

motifs.name: Chrome metallic gradient
motifs.use: Multi-stop metallic fill on type — Y2K.

motifs.name: Oversized background mark
motifs.use: Giant faint number/word/glyph behind content for depth.

motifs.name: Edge marquee strip
motifs.use: Repeating word strip along an edge (static).

motifs.name: Pill badge
motifs.use: Rounded label: slide counter, NEW, category.

motifs.name: Swipe / page affordance
motifs.use: '1/6' counter + 'Swipe ->' cue for carousels.

motifs.name: Hairline rule
motifs.use: Thin divider/accent line — Swiss/editorial structure.

motifs.name: Hard offset shadow
motifs.use: Solid non-blurred drop shadow — neo-brutalism.

motifs.name: Thick black border
motifs.use: 2-4px borders on blocks — neo-brutalism/bauhaus.

motifs.name: Frosted glass panel
motifs.use: backdrop-filter blur + inner white border + inset highlight.

motifs.name: Drop cap
motifs.use: Oversized first letter — magazine editorial.

motifs.name: Pull quote
motifs.use: Large set-off quotation — editorial.

motifs.name: Primary geometric shapes
motifs.use: Circles/bars/triangles as structure — bauhaus/memphis.

motifs.name: Confetti shapes
motifs.use: Scattered small geometric bits — memphis/playful.

motifs.name: Squiggle line
motifs.use: Wavy line accent — memphis/playful.

motifs.name: Gold deco linework
motifs.use: Thin metallic geometric frames — art deco.

motifs.name: Deco sunburst
motifs.use: Radiating rays — art deco/retro.

motifs.name: Misregistered overprint
motifs.use: Two ink layers offset + multiply — riso.

motifs.name: Terminal caret
motifs.use: Blinking-style block caret / prompt — mono/terminal.

motifs.name: Handwritten accent line
motifs.use: One script-font line (Caveat/Shantell) for a human aside.
